nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives DRIVE_SETUP_COMPLETE events from MX_00_Event_Router

nodes.name: Parse Event Data
nodes.notes: Extracts event data and calculates step_key for notification

nodes.name: Claim Workflow Step
nodes.notes: Atomic claim to prevent duplicate notifications

nodes.name: Step Claimed?
nodes.notes: If claimed=true: proceed. If false: already sent or in progress

parameters.query:
-- Fetch project details for notification
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.project_number,
  p.object_street,
  p.object_zip,
  p.object_city,
  p.drive_folder_id,
  p.created_at,
  c.company_name as client_name
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id
WHERE p.id = '{{ $('Parse Event Data').item.json.project_id }}'::uuid;

nodes.name: Fetch Project Details
nodes.notes: Gets project and client info for the notification

nodes.name: Format Telegram Message
nodes.notes: Builds formatted Telegram message with project info

nodes.name: Send Telegram
nodes.notes: Sends notification to Baugenius channel

nodes.name: Complete Workflow Step
nodes.notes: Marks workflow step as DONE

nodes.name: Emit NOTIFICATION_SENT
nodes.notes: Marks input event processed, emits NOTIFICATION_SENT for audit

nodes.name: Done (Success)
nodes.notes: Success response

nodes.name: Handle Not Claimed
nodes.notes: Handles DONE (skip - no double notification!) and IN_PROGRESS (exit)
